PlaydateConfig.description:
Raw config shape (what gets saved to disk). All fields optional -- only overrides are stored.

JSDoc comments on fields become `description` in the generated JSON Schema. Run `pnpm gen:schema` after changing this interface.

armToolchainPath.description: Path to arm-none-eabi toolchain (for C builds on Windows/Linux if not auto-detected).

autoOpenSimulator.description: Automatically open the simulator after building.

simulatorLogLines.description: Number of simulator log lines to keep in the ring buffer.
